CustomField.description: The date someone began working on the case. This is automatically entered when the case is set to any status other than "new". That way, we can report # of days to complete from start date, and number of dates/hours from CREATED DATE to START DATE
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date someone began working on the case. This is automatically entered when the case is set to any status other than "new". That way, we can report # of days to complete from start date, and number of dates/hours from CREATED DATE to START DATE
CustomField.label: Start Date
